text.title: vision-provider-selection Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vision-provider-selection as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using the most expensive model (Claude Opus or GPT-4.1) for simple bulk OCR without benchmarking cheaper alternatives first.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Gemini Flash 2.0 processes ~6000 pages per dollar vs Claude Opus at ~200 pages per dollar on equivalent plain OCR tasks; the quality difference is negligible for printed text with >100px font size.

failure-mode.description: Defaulting to URL-based image delivery for all requests because it is simpler to implement.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: URL images are fetched by the provider's infrastructure, creating uncontrolled data access logs; for documents containing PII or financial data this is a compliance violation in most jurisdictions.
